series_metadata.series_title: Document related to Ohio Constitutional Modernization Commission (OCMC)
series_metadata.series_description: Use OCMC-related vouchers, contracts, tables, and correspondnce to (1) document how OCMC funds are spent, (2) document on what terms OCMC consultants are hired and services are performed, (3) glean information to answer public records requests.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 50 years. ; Electronic: 50 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
